raw.subject: Your Killeen page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you often mention serving the Killeen area, and your experience working on a wide range of vehicles.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean potential customers are having to search for your business phone number online or relying on social media to find you – a lost opportunity for quick bookings and calls.

I took a look at your Facebook posts, and it seems like you might benefit from having a simple page that showcases your services and allows customers to easily contact you. I sketched up a quick idea based on what you've shared, including a prominent call-to-action for emergencies and a list of services that you offer.

https://damianbasilio.github.io/f/preview/jake-s-auto-repair-killeen/

If you'd like to discuss this further or get a quote for a straightforward project, please don't hesitate to reply or give me a quick call to explore your options. One flat project fee for local businesses can make a big difference in getting your message across.
